title: glycine soja f. lanceolata
intro: Glycine soja f. lanceolata, also known as Soybean or Soy Sauce Bean, is a variant of the soybean plant with lanceolate leaf shape. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Glycine soja f. lanceolata include lowering cholesterol levels, improving cardiovascular health, and aiding in weight management. Herbal preparations of this plant include tea, extract, and supplement forms, which can be found in various health food stores and online retailers.
